# metadata

**Instance Property**

The item’s metadata.

## Declaration

```swift
var metadata: [AnyHashable : Any]? { get }
```

## Discussion

The value of this property is `nil` unless a [doc://com.apple.imagecapturecore/documentation/ImageCaptureCore/ICCameraItem/requestMetadata()] message is sent to this object.

## Requesting Metadata

- **requestMetadata()**: Requests metadata for the item.
- **metadataIfAvailable**: The item’s metadata if it is readily available.
- **flushMetadataCache()**: Deletes the item’s cached metadata.
- **ICCameraItemMetadataOption**: An option for the item’s metadata.
